name: Tag Name Recommendations
description: Adds lightweight recommendation endpoints by comparing tags and title/name tokens. Recently watched recommendations require the official Playback Reporting plugin and use its real playback durations.
overview: Simple Jellyfin recommendations based on item tags, names, and real playback duration.

versions.changelog: Add optional Modular Home / Home Screen Sections integration for a homepage recommendation row.
Use Playback Reporting real playback durations for recent recommendation seeds.
